card_description: Nicholas Brady is a fictional character referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. First appears in *To Scare the Dead*. Context: "Dick identifies his experience as a literal fulfillment of Biblical promise (Psalm 116) and a commissioning into the class of "prophets."
